---
title: "The Infant’s Miscellany, or, Easy Lessons extracted from different authors, on a new plan"
---

## The Infant’s Miscellany, or, Easy Lessons extracted from different authors, on a new plan
**Date:** 1778
**Imprint:** London: Beecroft

### Notes

The Renier collection in the National Art Library, Victoria and Albert Museum, holds CMY\'s duodecimo copy of <i>The Infant’s Miscellany</i> (?1801),  with ownership inscriptions ‘F.M. Bargus 13 February 1801’ and (erased) ‘C. A. Colborne’ and the bookplate ‘From the Library of Charlotte M. Yonge’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
